title: Cosmic orbital/ocean review route and fixed visual bookmarks
summary: Ported the cosmic-earth-view orbital/ocean engine into earth-forge as a dedicated Cosmos Review route, added deterministic review camera bookmarks, stabilized the copied JONSWAP wave spectrum seed, added a bookmark integrity test, and created a local Codex handoff plus GIBS capabilities bootstrap script.
known_limits: The Cosmos Review route is a ported/isolation route, not yet merged with the R-0001 weather atlas shader path.
The new underwater bookmark is only a review placeholder; true underwater absorption still needs bathymetry/depth textures.
Visual screenshot validation was not captured in this environment; the route and bookmark integrity are build/test/lint validated.
NASA GIBS capability fetching is scripted but not yet integrated as runtime texture ingestion.
The GIBS capabilities command was not validated in this sandbox because DNS resolution failed with EAI_AGAIN; local Codex should retry on the project machine.
